risk_title: Persistent Grievance and Complaint Management Challenges
risk_summary: Despite establishment of grievance redress mechanisms (GRM portal, complaint boxes, planned hotline), the project is still implementing complaint management infrastructure as of March 2025, suggesting ongoing community concerns and tensions that require resolution.
evidence_quote: NHA is placing complaint boxes at key locations, and stakeholder engagement in villages surrounding the proposed alignment has increased. A 24/7 toll free complaints hotline is expected to become operational by end April 2025.
